titleStmt.title: SII 19.134: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 134. (A.R. No. 60 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE GAṆAPATĪŚVARA SHRINE, UTTARĀPATĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers a sale of two pieces of land tax-free by the sabhā of Marugal in Tirumarugal-nāḍu, to the temple of Paramēśvara at Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭāṅguḍi for the gold received by them from the temple and from an officer (or chief) named Gōdukulavaṉ Vīraśōḻaṉ alias Uttamaśōḻa-Nenmalināṭṭu-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ, to provide for the maintenance of two perpetual lamps in the temple. The surname of the latter suggests that the inscription may be assigned to Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉma
ṟku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu tirumarukal
nāṭṭu marukal sabhaiyom tirucceṅ
kāṭṭaṅkuṭi parameśvaraṟku nāṅkaḷ
poṉ koṇṭu Iṟaiyiliyāka can
tirātittaval viṟṟu Iṟaiyili cey
tukuṭutta nilamāvatu melūr nāṅka
ḷ viṟṟu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nila
m 5va� Añce yaṟumāvukku kiḻ
pāṟkellai Eṅkaṇilattu
kku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai
Eṅkaṇilattukkey vaṭakkum me
lpāṟkellai tirucceṅkāṭṭa
ṅkuṭi parameśvara nilattukku ki
ḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eṅkaṇi
lattukkey teṟkum Iccatu
kaiyāṉa
kotukulava
ṉ viracoḻanā
kiya Uttama
coḻa neṉma
lināṭṭu muve
ntaveḷāni
ṭai nāṅkaḷ
poṉ koṇ
ṭu Iṟaiyiliyā
kac cantirātit
taval niṟka vi
ṟṟu Iṟaiyili
ceytukuṭut
ta nilaṉ Eṅ
kaḷūr melūr
muḻaiyūrvā
yt teṉka
rai Eṟukāl mu
kattiṉ teṟ
kil vati nāṅka
ḷ poṉko
ṇṭu viṟṟu I
ṟaiyili ceytuku
ṭutta nilattu
kkellai Iṟaiyā
ṉkuṭi nilattu
kku meṟkun te
ṉpārkkellai ti
rucceṅkāṭṭa
ṅkuṭi nilattu
kku vaṭakku me
lpāṟkellai
kellai
Eṅka
ḷaṟukā
mukattu
kku teṟkum
cantracekara
vati
ḷaṭaṅka
m Iṭṭa pa
ricut tiru
nontāvi
ḷakku Ira
ṇṭukkuñ
cantirāti
ttaval
ceytu ku
ṭuttom
sabhai
yom .
Digital edition of SII 19.134 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
